scripts.postbuild: cp ../../dist/index.html ../../liuyao.html && rm -rf ../../assets && cp -r ../../dist/assets ../../ && cp ../../dist/index.html ../../liuyao-app/app/src/main/assets/ && rm -rf ../../liuyao-app/app/src/main/assets/assets && mkdir -p ../../liuyao-app/app/src/main/assets/assets && cp -r ../../dist/assets/* ../../liuyao-app/app/src/main/assets/assets/
